specific_mechanism: new RFF kernel attention layer introducing new attention computation graph and learnable bandwidth parameter (new computation graph edges)
llm_application: new RFF kernel attention layer: introduce a NEW learnable module with its own parameters (new attention computation graph) implementing new RFF kernel attention layer; the module adds learnable bandwidth parameter between existing layers, creating sub-quadratic kernel family that the baseline lacks; module is NOT a function of existing parameters
sub_mechanisms: M_3 new RFF kernel attention layer
